requirement_topic.en: KEMCO Mandatory Energy Efficiency Grade — Grade 1 to Grade 5

summary.en: South Korea requires covered heat-pump and air-conditioning products to comply with the KEMCO energy efficiency labelling framework before market placement. The label uses a Grade 1 to Grade 5 scale, with Grade 1 as the highest grade, and product classification, test data, model registration, and Korean label content must follow Korean rules rather than China label categories.
summary.zh: 韩国要求范围内热泵和空调产品在投放市场前符合KEMCO能效标识框架。标签采用1级至5级，1级为最高等级，产品分类、测试数据、型号登记和韩文标签内容必须按韩国规则执行，而非按中国能效标签类别执行。
summary.zht: 韓國要求範圍內熱泵和空調產品在投放市場前符合KEMCO能效標識框架。標籤採用1級至5級，1級為最高等級，產品分類、測試數據、型號登記和韓文標籤內容必須按韓國規則執行，而非按中國能效標籤類別執行。

standards_or_laws: KEMCO energy efficiency labelling and standards programme

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for heat-pump and air-conditioner COP, SCOP, and performance evidence, CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. China Energy Label values are not automatically mapped to South Korea's KEMCO Grade 1 to Grade 5 label.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作为热泵及空调COP、SCOP和性能证据，对适用的40 kW及以下热泵实施CCC强制认证，并以GB 9237作为制冷剂安全基线。中国能效标识数值不能自动映射为韩国KEMCO 1级至5级标签。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作為熱泵及空調COP、SCOP和性能證據，對適用的40 kW及以下熱泵實施CCC強制認證，並以GB 9237作為制冷劑安全基線。中國能效標識數值不能自動映射為韓國KEMCO 1級至5級標籤。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW

gap.en: Chinese GB efficiency reports may be useful engineering inputs, but exporters still need Korean classification, Korean test conditions, KEMCO registration data, Korean energy-label artwork, and grade calculation. Grade 1 is the highest grade in South Korea, so claims must not reuse China grade terminology without recalculation.
gap.zh: 中国GB能效报告可作为工程输入，但出口商仍需要韩国分类、韩国测试条件、KEMCO登记数据、韩国能效标签版面和等级计算。韩国1级为最高等级，因此不得未经重新计算就沿用中国等级表述。
gap.zht: 中國GB能效報告可作為工程輸入，但出口商仍需要韓國分類、韓國測試條件、KEMCO登記數據、韓國能效標籤版面和等級計算。韓國1級為最高等級，因此不得未經重新計算就沿用中國等級表述。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for covered heat-pump and air-conditioning products under KEMCO energy efficiency labelling rules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable Chinese energy efficiency categories; not equivalent to KEMCO grade

source.publisher: Korea Energy Agency / KEMCO Energy Efficiency Programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — KEMCO energy-efficiency grade labelling is a South Korea-specific market requirement; China efficiency data must be reclassified and recalculated.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——KEMCO能效等级标签是韩国特定市场要求；中国能效数据必须重新分类和计算。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——KEMCO能效等級標籤是韓國特定市場要求；中國能效數據必須重新分類和計算。

requirement_topic.en: Korean Performance Testing — SCOP, COP, Capacity, and 60 Hz Supply
requirement_topic.zh: 韩国性能测试——SCOP、COP、能力与60 Hz供电
requirement_topic.zht: 韓國性能測試——SCOP、COP、能力與60 Hz供電

summary.en: South Korea's energy-efficiency assessment for heat-pump HVAC products must reflect Korean product classes, rated capacities, seasonal performance metrics such as SCOP where applicable, and the Korean power system of 220 V single-phase residential supply or 380 V three-phase commercial supply at 60 Hz. China-market 50 Hz compressor, fan, inverter, and control designs require South Korea-specific validation.
summary.zh: 韩国对热泵HVAC产品的能效评估须反映韩国产品类别、额定能力、适用时的SCOP等季节性能指标，以及韩国220 V单相住宅供电或380 V三相商业供电、60 Hz电力系统。中国市场50 Hz压缩机、风机、变频器和控制设计需要进行韩国专用验证。
summary.zht: 韓國對熱泵HVAC產品的能效評估須反映韓國產品類別、額定能力、適用時的SCOP等季節性能指標，以及韓國220 V單相住宅供電或380 V三相商業供電、60 Hz電力系統。中國市場50 Hz壓縮機、風機、變頻器和控制設計需要進行韓國專用驗證。

standards_or_laws: KEMCO energy efficiency test and registration rules
Korean 220 V / 380 V, 60 Hz supply conditions
Applicable KS C IEC heat-pump and air-conditioner standards

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for COP, SCOP, capacity, and performance evidence, CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. China domestic testing typically assumes China-market electrical design conditions and does not prove 60 Hz Korean compatibility.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作为COP、SCOP、能力和性能证据，对适用的40 kW及以下热泵实施CCC强制认证，并以GB 9237作为制冷剂安全基线。中国国内测试通常基于中国市场电气设计条件，不能证明韩国60 Hz兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作為COP、SCOP、能力和性能證據，對適用的40 kW及以下熱泵實施CCC強制認證，並以GB 9237作為制冷劑安全基線。中國國內測試通常基於中國市場電氣設計條件，不能證明韓國60 Hz相容性。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW

gap.en: The voltage label may look similar for residential products because both China and South Korea use nominal 220 V, but the frequency difference is critical. A China 50 Hz heat pump cannot be treated as directly compatible with South Korea's 60 Hz grid without compressor, motor, inverter, protection, heating performance, noise, and durability validation.
gap.zh: 住宅产品的电压标签可能相似，因为中国和韩国均使用标称220 V，但频率差异是关键。未经压缩机、电机、变频器、保护、制热性能、噪声和耐久验证，中国50 Hz热泵不能被视为可直接适配韩国60 Hz电网。
gap.zht: 住宅產品的電壓標籤可能相似，因為中國和韓國均使用標稱220 V，但頻率差異是關鍵。未經壓縮機、電機、變頻器、保護、制熱性能、噪聲和耐久驗證，中國50 Hz熱泵不能被視為可直接適配韓國60 Hz電網。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Korean energy-efficiency registration or product safety evidence depends on rated performance and electrical supply conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable Chinese efficiency and CCC evidence; does not prove Korean 60 Hz operation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Critical gap — Korean energy and performance evidence must be generated or validated for 60 Hz operation; China 50 Hz heat-pump designs are not directly compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 关键差距——韩国能效和性能证据必须按60 Hz运行生成或验证；中国50 Hz热泵设计不能直接兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 關鍵差距——韓國能效和性能證據必須按60 Hz運行生成或驗證；中國50 Hz熱泵設計不能直接相容。
